name: Slopsmith Desktop Builder
postCreateCommand: test -d /workspaces/slopsmith || (echo 'ERROR: Slopsmith repository not found at ../slopsmith' && echo 'Please clone it adjacent to this repository:' && echo '  git clone https://github.com/byrongamatos/slopsmith.git ../slopsmith' && exit 1) && jq empty .build-config.json || (echo 'ERROR: .build-config.json is not valid JSON' && exit 1) && git submodule update --init --recursive && npm install
